title: Community Support in Action #Devconnect2025 #ethereum
description:
A personal moment with Thiru at Devconnect2025.  He opened up about experiencing racist comments online and how the local community here stepped in with kindness and support.

Talking about this isn’t easy, but his honesty is a reminder of the empathy and solidarity we should strive for in this #ecosystem.

We must build a more human, supportive space for everyone. ❤️
